projects.title: AI Portfolio
projects.description: This portfolio site is entirely built and maintained by AI through a custom Claude Code skill. I run a single slash command, and it generates the content, captures screenshots with Playwright (swapping in fake data for privacy-sensitive projects), previews locally, and publishes to GitHub Pages — all without me touching the code.
features: End-to-end AI workflow via a custom Claude Code skill (/showcase)
Automated screenshot capture using Playwright MCP tools
Privacy-safe screenshots with fake data substitution for sensitive projects
Data-driven card grid powered by a single JSON file
Click-to-expand overlay with screenshot gallery and feature list
Dark aesthetic with film grain texture and staggered card animations
Zero dependencies — no framework, no build step, just HTML/CSS/JS

projects.title: Asoona
projects.description: Asoona is a self-hosted, AI-first Asana replacement. Built with a REST API that Claude Code queries directly. Each project has a bottleneck indicator. External services can create tasks via inbound webhooks.
features: Drag-and-drop kanban board with customizable columns
Project status headers (objective, where I left off, bottleneck)
Full REST API for programmatic task management
Portfolio and list views with filtering and sorting
Custom fields and automation rules per project
SQLite-backed with real-time optimistic updates via SWR
Trash and restore for deleted tasks

projects.title: PFIN
projects.description: I built PFIN to make sense of my spending across multiple currencies and bank accounts. It processes bank statements from different sources, auto-categorizes transactions, and generates monthly summaries so I can see exactly where my money goes.
features: Multi-currency support (USD, CAD, IDR) with unified reporting
Bank statement PDF parsing from multiple institutions
Automatic transaction categorization by merchant and pattern
Monthly spending summaries with category breakdowns
Financial goal tracker with visual progress dashboard
Smart duplicate detection and self-transfer exclusion
Handles Wise, traditional banks, and credit card statements

projects.title: Fling
projects.description: Fling is a single-purpose iOS app for getting thoughts out of your head as fast as possible. You open it, type, swipe up, and the note saves as a Markdown file to your configured folder. Inspired by the now-defunct Squarespace Note — minimal UI, satisfying gesture, zero friction.
features: Swipe-up gesture to instantly save notes as Markdown files
iCloud Documents sync for cross-device access
Markdown syntax highlighting in the editor
Configurable save location via iOS folder picker
Security-scoped bookmarks for persistent folder access
Pure SwiftUI, no third-party dependencies
Haptic feedback on successful save

projects.title: HealthDash
projects.description: I wanted a single dashboard for all my Garmin health data without relying on the Garmin Connect app. HealthDash pulls metrics from my Garmin watch daily via an automated pipeline and renders everything in a static HTML dashboard I can open anytime.
features: Automated daily data collection from Garmin Connect API
Static HTML dashboard with no server required
Sleep analysis with duration, stages, and trend tracking
Heart health metrics including resting HR, HRV, and VO2 max
Activity tracking with steps, calories, and workout history
Body composition trends (weight, hydration, respiration)
macOS launchd integration for hands-free daily updates

projects.title: Copy Jamie
projects.description: I built copyjamie.com as the foundation for my email copywriting portfolio. It's a static site with no framework — just clean HTML, CSS, and a touch of JavaScript. The actual email portfolio hasn't been added yet, but the site is live and designed to load fast, look sharp, and let the writing speak for itself.
features: Static HTML/CSS site hosted on a custom domain
Responsive design that works across all devices
Contact page with a clean inquiry form
Privacy policy page for GDPR compliance
Custom favicon set (SVG, PNG, ICO)
Open Graph meta tags for social sharing
Zero dependencies, instant load times

projects.title: YT Transcripts
projects.description: I built this to save time on long YouTube videos. It pulls transcripts from any YouTube video or channel, summarizes them with Claude, and can synthesize a creator's full body of work into a single overview. The Streamlit UI makes it easy to register channels and browse summaries.
features: Pull transcripts from any YouTube video automatically
AI-powered summarization using Claude
Cross-video synthesis across a creator's entire catalogue
Channel and playlist registration for batch processing
Streamlit web UI for browsing and managing summaries
File-based data storage (no database required)
Per-video and per-creator markdown summaries

projects.title: Bookwise
projects.description: I wanted a lightweight way to track my reading without a heavyweight app. Bookwise is a browser-based book collection tracker that imports data from my Kindle, lets me manage my library, and keeps a wishlist — all in a single HTML file with local storage.
features: Kindle data import for bulk library setup
Book collection management with search and filtering
Reading wishlist tracking
Review and rating system for finished books
JSON backup and restore for portability
Pure HTML/CSS/JS with no build step
Local storage persistence, no account required

projects.title: Media Fetch Bot
projects.description: I built this Telegram bot to streamline how I discover and organize movies and TV shows. I send it an IMDB or TVDB link — or just a title — and it looks up the media, shows me the details, and adds it to my watchlist. All from a Telegram chat.
features: IMDB and TVDB link parsing for instant media lookup
Plain text title search for movies and TV shows
Inline confirmation with poster and details before adding
Personal watchlist management via chat interface
Runs as a background service via macOS launchd
Single-user security with Telegram user ID whitelisting
Async Python with long-polling for responsive interaction

projects.title: Brutalist Blog
projects.description: A personal blog and copywriting portfolio built with Eleventy. It has a deliberately raw, brutalist design aesthetic — no frills, no filler. Sections for blog posts, work case studies, a curated reading list, research notes, and experiments.
features: Built with Eleventy (11ty) static site generator
Blog with posts on copywriting and brand strategy
Work section with client case study pages
Curated reading list with opinion-based sorting
Research and experiments sections
Nunjucks templating with custom filters
Zero JavaScript payload in the output
